name: The Machinist, Camie Tigwelde • Fortnite
description:
I’ll control my fire! I’ll build my machines! I’ll construct! Invent! Revolutionize! And I’ll burn so hot that it’ll glass this wasteland!

FORTNITE SERIES

Explosive, creative and dedicated, Camie Tigwelde, better known as “The Machinist,” is a prodigious inventor that just won’t quit, desiring to leave behind a legacy that others would have no choice but to gaze upon. With every machine, every weld, every sleepless night and bullet fired, she’s one step closer to burning her name across the sky.

The skin is from Fortnite’s Chapter 5 Season 3 Battle Pass. I won’t be including any other style color expect her red trench-coat she can wear in-game. This story is much more closely-tied to Fortnite’s story, yet is still my unique spin on it (Art is by https://x.com/EdMonMondo, once again an extremely talented individual you should check out.)

So, here we are again, another Fortnite skin. This’ll probably be the last one in a while since I want to provide actual variety in my characters.

Have a good day, night, whatever, and enjoy building a story with her.
creator: Iliveagain
